title: Zak Tool 1pc Tactical Connector Clip for ZT55 Duty Belt Clips (PN# ZT55-C)
description:
This Zak Tools Key Ring Holder was designed for law enforcement to have easy and quick access to their tools and handcuff keys. It's perfect for duty belts up to 2.25" wide. The holder features a black powder coat finish, easy one-hand operation, ideal construction use, and secure positive retention. This connector clip allows you to connect 2 ring holders easily (sold separately).

Zak Tool 1pc Tactical Connector Clip for ZT55 Duty Belt Clips (PN# ZT55-C)

This Zak Tool ZT-55C is a Key Ring Connector Clip for Duty Belts. It is designed for law enforcement to have easy and quick access to their tools and handcuff keys.

Key Features

  • Black Powder Coat Finish
  • Connects (2) ZT55s evenly spaced apart
  • Easy One Hand Operation
  • Dimensions: 5 x 0.5 x 4 inches
  • Weight: 5.8 oz
  • GENUINE ZAK TOOL USA

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ZT55-C
  • UPC: 060886762775
  • Color: Black
  • Size: One Size

This connector clip is to be used in connection with (2) ZT55 Key Clips to keep them evenly spaced and well organized on your person. The holder features a black powder coat finish, easy one-hand operation, ideal construction use, and secure positive retention.

MADE IN THE USA BY ZAK TOOL

This connector clip allows you to connect 2 ring holders easily (sold separately).
